node.comment: I took this class twice, I find his project assignment method difficult. It feels unreasonably difficult.

251 was a challenging class, but it never was an unfair class. Lecturers were so huge, yet Ayala was able to condense and make all the information so easy to digest. Would def take again if I had the chance. Really nice professor to, and got on your level when in Office Hours.

Very chill professor and very supportive during help hours. extra credits for early project submission and labs are nice. Lectures are amazing when it comes to explaining the difficult concepts. There is also paired oral exams.
He is so sweet and explains the concepts so well. Made the class enjoyable and makes sure to help if you are struggling.
Very good professor, easy to talk to, and approachable.

6 projects, 2 midterms, 2 oral exams, and a final. The course was done extremely well having gone to every lecture made every piece of the projects seem to fall into place. Ayala presented every concept well and cleared up any confusion as they were brought up. Incentives for turning in projects early were very helpful.
Very friendly and helpful professor. Explains concepts effectively. Highly recommend!

The class was alright. I feel the exams weren't designed properly, as there were 4 exams that were 10-12 questions each and had been each 6% of your grade. Projects tend to be difficult and require a great understanding of the topics at hand. TA's are accessible, professor is accessible. I think if the exams were fixed, the class would be better
Midterm exams were surprisingly difficult, but he is a great, funny teacher who can explain topics pretty well.
